# fly_volume (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io volume. Import using app_name/volume_id: `terraform import fly_volume.example my-app/vol_abc123`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_app" "example" {
  name     = "my-volume-app"
  org_slug = "personal"
}

resource "fly_volume" "data" {
  app    = fly_app.example.name
  name   = "data"
  region = "iad"
  size_gb = 10
}

resource "fly_machine" "example" {
  app    = fly_app.example.name
  region = "iad"
  image  = "registry.fly.io/my-app:latest"

  mount {
    volume = fly_volume.data.id
    path   = "/data"
  }

  guest {
    cpu_kind  = "shared"
    cpus      = 1
    memory_mb = 256
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The name of the app the volume belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `name` (String) The name of the volume. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `region` (String) The region where the volume is created. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `size_gb` (Number) The size of the volume in GB. Can only be increased (extend-only).

### Optional

- `auto_backup_enabled` (Boolean) Whether automatic backups are enabled for the volume.
- `encrypted` (Boolean) Whether the volume is encrypted. Defaults to true. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `require_unique_zone` (Boolean) Whether the volume requires a unique zone. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `snapshot_id` (String) The ID of the snapshot to restore from. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `snapshot_retention` (Number) The number of snapshots to retain for the volume.
- `source_volume_id` (String) The ID of the source volume to fork from. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

### Read-Only

- `attached_machine_id` (String) The ID of the machine the volume is attached to.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the volume was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the volume.
- `state` (String) The current state of the volume.
- `zone` (String) The zone the volume is in.
